name: Fried Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, salt, dry mustard, and paprika.
2. Set aside.
3. Place the buttermilk in a small bowl.
4. Dip each mushroom piece into the buttermilk.
5. Coat the mushrooms with the flour mixture by placing them back in the large bowl and shaking off any excess.
6. Fry the mushrooms until they are golden brown.
